hello: Hello! How can I help you today?
hi: Hi there! Nice to meet you.
how are you: I am doing great. How about you?
what is your name: I am an AI Chatbot created using Python.
help: I can answer simple predefined questions.
project info: This project is a Simple AI Chatbot developed using Python, Flask, NLTK, and Bootstrap 5 for modern, responsive UI elements.
nltk: NLTK (Natural Language Toolkit) is a powerful Python library used for building applications that analyze and work with human language data.
flask: Flask is a lightweight, clean, and highly extensible Python micro web framework ideal for small services and projects.
